work_unit: AS-EC-008 fix: opt-worktree.sh cmd_commit orphaned files on commit failure
situation: audit-2026-07-02-002 finding AS-EC-008 (priority 8): cmd_commit step ② does cd $target then git add+commit. Under set -euo pipefail, if git commit fails (e.g. nothing to commit after .opt-direction removal), script aborts with cwd=$target. Files already cp'd in step ① remain as orphans in target worktree; main working tree never gets restored (step ③ skipped).
action: Added ERR trap around the critical commit section (cd $target → git add → git commit). On failure: reset HEAD, checkout tracked files, clean untracked (preserving .opt-direction), cd back to PROJECT. Trap cleared immediately after successful commit so later assertion/restore failures don't trigger commit cleanup.
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh commit succeeded, branch auto/opt-worktree-shift-1782932717 pushed to origin. Diff adds _commit_err_cleanup function + trap ERR before cd $target, trap - ERR after git commit succeeds. Covers git add -A, git rm --cached .opt-direction, _assert_no_collateral_revert, and git commit — all commands between trap set and trap clear.
next_suggestion: Continue audit-2026-07-02-002 derived_fixes queue: next pending is AS-EC-009 (opt-worktree.sh cmd_commit no worktree-level locking, priority 9)
